story.asA: As a new user registering on the platform
story.iWant: I want clear feedback after signup about what to do next
story.soThat: So that I understand the email confirmation process and can successfully access the platform.
story.tasks:
Task 1: Create Email Confirmation Success Component (AC1, AC5, AC6) - [ ] 1.1 Create src/components/auth/EmailConfirmationMessage.tsx with success state, email display, instructions, accessibility attributes; props { email: string; onResend: () => Promise<void> } - [ ] 1.2 Add Lucide icons: CheckCircle, Mail, RefreshCw - [ ] 1.3 Style with theme tokens (glass-morphism optional)
Task 2: Implement Resend Confirmation API (AC2) - [ ] 2.1 Add resendConfirmationEmail to src/lib/auth/supabase-auth.ts using supabase.auth.resend({ type: "signup", email }) - [ ] 2.2 Export from auth utilities - [ ] 2.3 Handle rate limit error (60s cooldown)
Task 3: Update Signup Page with Success State (AC1, AC2) - [ ] 3.1 Modify src/app/(auth)/signup/page.tsx to add signupSuccess state and render EmailConfirmationMessage on success - [ ] 3.2 Remove immediate redirect to /create-company after signup - [ ] 3.3 Add "Ja confirmou? Fazer login" link in success state
Task 4: Update Login Page with Unconfirmed Email Detection (AC3) - [ ] 4.1 Modify src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx to detect Supabase error for unconfirmed email and store attempted email - [ ] 4.2 Add resend button component below error message - [ ] 4.3 Clear error when user modifies email field
Task 5: Create Onboarding Page (AC4) - [ ] 5.1 Create src/app/onboarding/page.tsx to redirect based on company_id presence - [ ] 5.2 Options UI: Create Company and Join via Invite Code - [ ] 5.3 Handle auth callback redirect from email confirmation
Task 6: Update Auth Callback Handler (AC4) - [ ] 6.1 Verify src/app/auth/callback/route.ts exists and handles email confirmation - [ ] 6.2 Ensure redirect goes to /onboarding not /dashboard - [ ] 6.3 Handle error states (invalid token, expired link)
Task 7: Unit Tests - [ ] 7.1 Test EmailConfirmationMessage renders correctly (AC1, AC2, AC5, AC6) - [ ] 7.2 Test resend button loading states and cooldown (AC2) - [ ] 7.3 Test login page unconfirmed email detection and resend flow (AC3) - [ ] 7.4 Test onboarding page routing logic for company/no-company (AC4) - [ ] 7.5 Test accessibility: aria-live/role and focus after state changes (AC5) - [ ] 7.6 Test i18n/PT-BR: no hardcoded EN strings in added components (AC6)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
AC1 - Email Confirmation Success Message - After successful signup, show a clear success message with the user's email - Display step-by-step instructions: check email, click link, proceed to onboarding - Include visual indicators (checkmark icon, email icon) - Message should be prominent and not easily dismissed - Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.1-registration-ux-feedback
AC2 - Resend Confirmation Email Button - Add "Resend confirmation email" button below the success message - Button calls supabase.auth.resend({ type: "signup", email }) - Show loading state while sending - Show success toast: "Email reenviado com sucesso!" - Implement rate limiting feedback (Supabase has built-in 60s cooldown) - Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.1-registration-ux-feedback
AC3 - Login Page Unconfirmed Email Detection - On login attempt with unconfirmed email, detect the error - Show specific message: "Email nao confirmado" - Display resend button with the attempted email pre-filled - Clear error state when user starts typing again - Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.1-registration-ux-feedback
AC4 - Post-Confirmation Onboarding Redirect - After email confirmation, user lands on /onboarding page - If user has no company_id -> show Create Company and Join via Invite Code buttons - If user has company_id -> redirect to /dashboard - Handle edge case: user confirmed but page not refreshed - Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.1-registration-ux-feedback
AC5 - Accessibility (PRD NFR) - All auth success/error messages use role="alert" or aria-live="polite" - Resend button and links have clear labels for screen readers - Focus management after state changes - Source: docs/prd.md#non-functional-requirements
AC6 - Portugues and Prep for i18n - All strings in PT-BR per config - Structure ready for future i18n extraction (no hardcoded EN strings) - Source: .bmad/bmm/config.yaml

artifacts.docs: docs/epics.md | Story 2.1: Registration UX Feedback | Acceptance Criteria | Signup success message, resend button, login detects unconfirmed email, redirect to /onboarding with create/join options. docs/sprint-artifacts/tech-spec-epic-2.md | Epic Technical Specification: Epic 2 – Authentication & Company Management | Overview | Hotfix scope covers feedback pos-signup, resend confirmation, onboarding redirect, Supabase Auth/RLS alignment. docs/prd.md | Non-Functional Requirements | NFR004 Accessibility | UI must comply with WCAG 2.1 Level AA with keyboard navigation and screen reader support. docs/architecture.md | Authentication Architecture | RLS Enforcement | All database access uses server-side Supabase client to preserve auth.uid() and middleware for route protection. docs/sprint-artifacts/hotfix-epic2-invitation-flow.md | Hotfix Epic 2: Invitation & Registration Flow | Story 2.X Registration UX Feedback | Problem statement: no feedback after signup; expected message with email, steps, resend button, onboarding redirect.
artifacts.code: src/app/(auth)/signup/page.tsx#L20-L140 | page component | On successful signUp shows toast then router.push('/create-company'); lacks success state with email confirmation and resend flow. src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx#L20-L170 | page component | Uses mapSupabaseAuthError and CompanyContext redirects; no explicit handling for Supabase email_not_confirmed or resend control. src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx#L94-L148 | AuthContext | signUp uses supabaseClient.auth.signUp and syncUserProfile; no resend helper or success-state handoff, assumes immediate navigation. src/lib/auth/error-messages.ts#L1-L55 | mapSupabaseAuthError | Error mapping returns English strings; email not confirmed branch is generic and not PT-BR. src/lib/supabase/server-client.ts#L1-L45 | createSupabaseServerClient | Server-side Supabase client required in API routes to preserve auth.uid() for RLS.

story-context.constraints: Use createSupabaseServerClient in API routes to satisfy RLS; never use browser Supabase client in APIs. All user-facing auth strings should be PT-BR and ready for future i18n (avoid hardcoded EN). Respect NFR004 accessibility: role="alert"/aria-live on success and error states; manage focus on state changes. Supabase resend API enforces ~60s cooldown; surface UX feedback and avoid repeated calls during cooldown. Follow repository/context patterns already in src/contexts and src/lib/auth; keep within users table (no profiles table).
story-context.interfaces: AuthContext.signUp(email: string, password: string, displayName?: string): Promise<void> (src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx#L94-L148) supabaseClient.auth.resend({ type: 'signup', email: string }): Promise<{ data: unknown; error: unknown }> (Supabase JS, used for confirmation resend) mapSupabaseAuthError(error: unknown): string (src/lib/auth/error-messages.ts#L1-L55) — needs PT-BR mapping for email_not_confirmed.

tests.standards: Use Vitest + @testing-library/react (happy-dom) for components; Playwright for end-to-end auth flows; assert accessibility roles/aria per NFR.
tests.locations: __tests__/; vitest.config.mts; playwright.config.ts; auth components under src/app/(auth) for RTL coverage.
tests.ideas: AC1: signup success renders email and steps with aria-live alert. AC2: resend button calls supabase.auth.resend with provided email, shows loading, blocks during 60s cooldown and shows success toast. AC3: login surfaces PT-BR "Email nao confirmado" message when Supabase returns email_not_confirmed and clears on input change; resend uses attempted email. AC4: onboarding redirect sends users with company_id to /dashboard and shows create-company/join options when null.
